member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.DiagnosticIds.DiagnosticIds
member.summary: Various diagnostic IDs reported by this repo.
member.remarks: When adding a new diagnostic ID, add a corresponding suppression to the root Directory.Build.targets file, and add a documentation entry to docs/list-of-diagnostics.md.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.DiagnosticIds.DiagnosticIds.Experiments
member.summary: Experiments supported by this repo.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw
member.summary: Defines static methods used to throw exceptions.
member.remarks: The main purpose is to reduce code size, improve performance, and standardize exception messages.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNull``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified argument is .
member.typeparam: Argument type to be checked for .
member.param: Object to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrMemberNull``2(``0,``1,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified argument is , or if the specified member is .
member.typeparam: Argument type to be checked for .
Member type to be checked for .
member.param: Argument to be checked for .
Object member to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.
The name of the member.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfMemberNull``2(``0,``1,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified member is .
member.typeparam: Member type to be checked for .
member.param: Argument to which member belongs.
Object member to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.
The name of the member.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrWhitespace(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws either an or an if the specified string is or whitespace respectively.
member.param: String to be checked for or whitespace.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrEmpty(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the string is , or if it is empty.
member.param: String to be checked for or empty.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfBufferTooSmall(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the argument's buffer size is less than the required buffer size.
member.param: The actual buffer size.
The required buffer size.
The name of the parameter to be checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfOutOfRange``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the enum value is not valid.
member.param: The argument to evaluate.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrEmpty``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the collection is , or if it is empty.
member.param: The collection to evaluate.
The name of the parameter being checked.
member.typeparam: The type of objects in the collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentNullException(System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentNullException(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentOutOfRangeException(System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentOutOfRangeException(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentOutOfRangeException(System.String,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
The value of the argument that caused this exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentException(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentException(System.String,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.
member.remarks: If the is not a , the current exception is raised in a catch block that handles the inner exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.InvalidOperationException(System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.InvalidOperationException(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: A message that describes the error.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfLessThan(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified number is less than min.
member.param: Number to be expected being less than min.
The number that must be less than the argument.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.summary: Throws an if the specified number is greater than max.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HybridCacheBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Configuration extension methods for / .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HybridCacheBuilderExtensions.AddSerializer``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.IHybridCacheBuilder,Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.IHybridCacheSerializer{``0})
member.summary: Serialize values of type with the specified serializer from .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HybridCacheBuilderExtensions.AddSerializer``2(Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.IHybridCacheBuilder)
member.summary: Serialize values of type with the serializer of type .
member.typeparam: The serializer to use for this type.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HybridCacheBuilderExtensions.AddSerializerFactory(Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.IHybridCacheBuilder,Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.IHybridCacheSerializerFactory)
member.summary: Add as an additional serializer factory, which can provide serializers for multiple types.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HybridCacheBuilderExtensions.AddSerializerFactory``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.IHybridCacheBuilder)
member.summary: Add a factory of type as an additional serializer factory, which can provide serializers for multiple types.
member.typeparam: The type of the serializer factory.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HybridCacheServiceExtensions
member.summary: Configuration extension methods for .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HybridCacheServiceExtensions.AddHybridCache(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.HybridCacheOptions})
member.summary: Adds support for multi-tier caching services.
member.param: The to add the service to.
A delegate to run to configure the instance.
member.returns: A builder instance that allows further configuration of the service.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HybridCacheServiceExtensions.AddHybridCache(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds support for multi-tier caching services.
member.param: The to add the service to.
member.returns: A builder instance that allows further configuration of the service.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HybridCacheServiceExtensions.AddKeyedHybridCache(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Object,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.HybridCacheOptions})
member.summary: Adds support for multi-tier caching services with a keyed registration.
member.param: The to add the service to.
The key for the service registration.
A delegate to run to configure the instance.
member.returns: A builder instance that allows further configuration of the service.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HybridCacheServiceExtensions.AddKeyedHybridCache(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Object,System.String,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.HybridCacheOptions})
member.summary: Adds support for multi-tier caching services with a keyed registration.
member.param: The to add the service to.
The key for the service registration.
The named options name to use for the instance.
A delegate to run to configure the instance.
member.returns: A builder instance that allows further configuration of the service.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HybridCacheServiceExtensions.AddKeyedHybridCache(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds support for multi-tier caching services with a keyed registration.
member.param: The to add the service to.
The key for the service registration.
member.returns: A builder instance that allows further configuration of the service.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HybridCacheServiceExtensions.AddKeyedHybridCache(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Adds support for multi-tier caching services with a keyed registration.
member.param: The to add the service to.
The key for the service registration.
The named options name to use for the instance.
member.returns: A builder instance that allows further configuration of the service.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HybridCacheServiceExtensions.PrepareServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds the services required for hybrid caching.
member.param: The to prepare with prerequisites.
member.returns: A builder instance that allows further configuration of the service.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.HybridCacheOptions
member.summary: Options for configuring the default implementation.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.HybridCacheOptions.DefaultEntryOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets the default global options to be applied to operations.
member.remarks: If options are specified at the individual call level, the non-null values are merged (with the per-call options being used in preference to the global options). If no value is specified for a given option (globally or per-call), the implementation can choose a reasonable default.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.HybridCacheOptions.DisableCompression
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether compression for this instance is disabled.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.HybridCacheOptions.MaximumPayloadBytes
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum size of cache items.
member.value: The maximum size of cache items. The default value is 1 MiB.
member.remarks: Attempts to store values over this size are logged, and the value isn't stored in the cache.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.HybridCacheOptions.MaximumKeyLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum permitted length (in characters) of keys.
member.value: The maximum permitted length of keys, in characters. The default value is 1024 characters.
member.remarks: Attempts to use keys over this size are logged.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.HybridCacheOptions.ReportTagMetrics
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to use "tags" data as dimensions on metric reporting.
member.value: to use "tags" data as dimensions on metric reporting; otherwise, .
member.remarks: If enabled, take care to ensure that tags don't contain data that should not be visible in metrics systems.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.HybridCacheOptions.DistributedCacheServiceKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the key used to resolve the distributed cache service from the .

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.IHybridCacheBuilder
member.summary: Helper API for configuring .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.IHybridCacheBuilder.Services
member.summary: Gets the services collection associated with this instance.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.Internal.DefaultHybridCache
member.summary: The inbuilt implementation of , as registered via .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.Internal.DefaultHybridCache.CacheItem.Release
member.summary: Signal that the consumer is done with this item (ref-count decr).
member.returns: True if this is the final release.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.Internal.DefaultHybridCache.DebugTryGetCacheItem(System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.Internal.DefaultHybridCache.CacheItem@)
member.summary: Auxiliary API for testing purposes, allowing confirmation of the internal state independent of the public API.
Initializes a new instance of the class optionally with shared cancellation support.
Initializes a new instance of the class using a fixed cancellation token.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.Internal.ImmutableTypeCache
member.summary: Utility type for determining whether a type is blittable; the logic for this is very TFM dependent.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.Internal.ImmutableTypeCache`1
member.summary: Simple memoize storage for whether the type is blittable, in particular to avoid repeated runtime tests in down-level TFMs where this is trickier to determine. The JIT is very effective at accessing this memoized value.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.Internal.RecyclableArrayBufferWriter`1.DetachCommitted(System.Int32@)
member.summary: Disconnect the current buffer so that we can store it without it being recycled.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid.Internal.TagSet
member.summary: Represents zero (null), one (string) or more (string[]) tags, avoiding the additional array overhead when necessary.
